.@FEMA’s Disaster Relief Fund —the funding used to respond to and recover from disasters—has fallen below the level needed to sustain normal operations, with CURRENT projections showing ONLY about 30 days of remaining funding capacity, forcing FEMA to implement Immediate Needs Funding. Because Democrats refuse to fund DHS, disaster recovery efforts may be delayed until funding is restored — endangering countless American lives.

Democrats must stop playing political games and REOPEN DHS NOW.

tweets.text:
HORRIFYING: Illegal alien from India BRUTALLY ASSAULTS mother and BITES her 3-year-old child’s face.

The alien, Atharva Vyas, randomly assaulted Gabriella Perez and her daughter at a San Antonio park. The attack began as Vyas forcefully grabbed Perez by the hair, causing her daughter to fall from her arms. While Perez was on the ground, Vyas assaulted the child, causing bodily and facial injuries, including bite marks and the loss of two teeth.   

Vyas first entered the country in August 2023 on a student visa, and was arrested three months later at the University of Texas campus for felony assault. Despite the university contacting ICE about the incident, the Biden Administration took NO enforcement action against Vyas.

tweets.text:
FOREIGN FRAUDSTER SENTENCED: @HSINewYork investigated and helped sentence foreign fraudster James Andrew Wellesley for his role in a Ponzi scheme that defrauded investors nearly $100 MILLION. 

Wellesley, a British national, and his partner posed as executives of a fake wine company, Bordeaux Cellars, targeting nearly 140 people around the world — including 71 Americans. 

He was sentenced to 10 years in prison and ordered to pay $1 million in forfeiture. Wellesley also has two prior convictions in the U.K. 

We are committed to holding ANYONE who steals from American citizens accountable for their crimes.

tweets.text:
SOMALI PIRATE ARRESTED.

@CBP arrested Said Jama Ahmed, an illegal alien from Somalia with a prior piracy-related history. Ahmed had outstanding warrant for falsely making, using, and forging a passport, as well as a fingerprint match linking him to a 2012 national security threat. 

This threat occurred during an encounter when the U.S.S. Halsey responded to a distress call from a vessel that had been hijacked by pirates in the Gulf of Aden. 

Ahmed first illegally entered our nation under the Biden administration in 2022. He was issued a full extradition warrant dated 4/24/2025.

DHS will continue to work to arrest criminal illegal aliens to protect the American homeland from ALL threats.
